title: Carolina Terrain Field Operations
description: Full-service stormwater construction, maintenance, and emergency repair services operating across North and South Carolina.
successCriteria: Active client base with recurring maintenance contracts

title: Stormwater SCM Platform
description: Web-based asset management and compliance tracking platform for municipal and commercial stormwater programs.

title: Terrain Vision AI Analysis
description: Computer vision platform for automated drainage deficiency detection from drone, satellite, and field imagery.

title: TRN Utility Credit Launch
description: Optional ecosystem incentive token with transparent supply mechanics and utility-focused design.

title: Terrain Guard Sensor Network
description: IoT monitoring platform for real-time SCM performance tracking with automated alerting.

title: Evidence Chain Integration
description: Unified audit trail system linking all platform activities with tamper-evident logging.

title: Drainage Academy Launch
description: Online learning platform with certified courses for stormwater professionals.

title: Multi-State Service Expansion
description: Extend Carolina Terrain field operations to Virginia, Georgia, and Tennessee markets.

title: Enterprise Compliance Suite
description: Integrated platform combining all Terrain products for large-scale municipal and enterprise deployments.

title: Carbon Credit Integration
description: Connect verified stormwater infrastructure performance to carbon credit marketplaces.
